parameters.filterString: ={{ (() => { const now = new Date(); const firstDayThisMonth = new Date(now.getFullYear(), now.getMonth(), 1); const firstDayLastMonth = new Date(now.getFullYear(), now.getMonth() - 1, 1); return 'created_at.gte.' + firstDayLastMonth.toISOString() + ',created_at.lt.' + firstDayThisMonth.toISOString(); })() }}

parameters.subject: ={{ '[Wdrażaj.ai] Monthly Automation Report: '+ $('Set project name').first().json.project_name + ' - ' + $json.reportPeriod }}
